visa_types.overview:
Overview
It is issued to third-state citizens who are to travel to the Republic of Moldova, for short periods of time, in order to participate in sports contests.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
It is issued to third-state citizens who are to travel to the Republic of Moldova, for short periods of time, in order to participate in sports contests.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Sports Activity (Type – C/S)]
Please Note:
Visa Fee to be paid in Cash/POS/UPI at VFS counter. 
Visa Fee is Non-Refundable. 
Visa Fee is Gratis for Minors (upto 18 yrs of age)

[Table:  Tourist Visa (Type – C/T)]
Please note:
VFS Logistic charges to be paid in Cash/POS/UPI at the time of submission.
There is no exemption for VFS Service charge.
The above fee is non-refundable and non-transferable.

## Documents Required
- Application Form
- Travel document (passport) issued in the past 10 years, valid for at least 3 months beyond the intended date of leaving the territory of the Republic of Moldova (in the case of minors - additionally the birth certificate and the passport of the legal representative);
- Two (02) recent passport size photographs. A récent mat, colour photo 35mm x 45mm;
- The invitation issued by the General Inspectorate for Migration, if required (https://mfa.gov.md/en/content/visa-regime-foreigners), or the residence permit or valid visa (except a transit visa) issued by a member state of the European Union or by a state part to the Schengen Agreement, by the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, by the United States of America or by Canada; (must be valid at the time of submission at Embassy of Moldova)
- Official list of the foreign delegation, with the position of each member;
- Reservation at a tourist accommodation unit or, if applicable, the commitment of maintenance and accommodation filled and signed by a person from the Republic of Moldova. Exception: foreigners who obtain visas based in the invitation issued by the General Inspectorate for Migration;
- Reservation of a round-trip ticket valid up to the destination or the driving license, the green card insurance and the registration documents of the vehicle, if traveling by car;
- Proof of means of subsistence (A bank statement or bank letter must be submitted, issued no earlier than 10 days before the date of document submission at the Embassy of Moldova, demonstrating financial coverage of at least EUR 30 per day of stay, and not less than EUR 300 for stays shorter than 10 days.) or, if applicable, the commitment of maintenance and accommodation filled and signed by a person from the Republic of Moldova.
- Travel medical insurance valid throughout the territory of the Republic of Moldova, which fully covers the expected period of stay and all expenses that repatriation for medical reasons, emergency medical treatments and/or emergency hospitalization or death may require, but not less than 30,000 euros
Note: Color Photocopies of all the original Indian documents and documents received from Moldova (Passport, previous visas, PCC, Invitation, Contract etc..) needs to be submitted along with the application.

## Photo Specifications
- The photograph must be in color.
- It should be without border.
- It should have a white background only.
- It should have a close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-80% of the photograph.
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly at the camera.
- It should be 3.5 cm X 4.5 cm.
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 1 month old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- Photograph can be taken with headgear, after consideration on case to case basis if the applicant wears headgear on religious grounds. The main characteristics of the face must be apparent from the photograph. Chin, nose, eyes, ears and eyebrows must not be covered; the forehead should be uncovered to the extent that the shape of the face is apparent. Teeth should not be visible.
- It should be without hat/cap.
- The photograph should not have any staple marks.
- Scanned & color photocopies would NOT be accepted.

## Processing Time
Processing time for Moldova Visa would be as per below:
- India - minimum 10 working days
Please Note: -
- Please note that this is an indicative processing time only. Processing time may increase or decrease at the discretion of the Embassy of Moldova, New Delhi.

Visa Application Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/aWhBEKEBU2VHpXmpCy3Zt/5b705c9d3f2d59dbdd75e3afd0fcdfb5/visa-application-form.pdf)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
It is issued to third-country nationals who are to enter the Republic of Moldova to undergo long-term medical treatment, therapy and rehabilitation, within public or private medical institutions if they submit a letter of acceptance from the respective institutions, specifying the diagnosis and the duration of the treatment. This type of visa may also be granted to a potential companion who assists such third-country nationals, should they not be able to take care of themselves if this is expressly mentioned in the letter of acceptance.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
It is issued to third-country nationals who are to enter the Republic of Moldova to undergo long-term medical treatment, therapy and rehabilitation, within public or private medical institutions if they submit a letter of acceptance from the respective institutions, specifying the diagnosis and the duration of the treatment. This type of visa may also be granted to a potential companion who assists such third-country nationals, should they not be able to take care of themselves if this is expressly mentioned in the letter of acceptance.

## Visa Fees

[Table:      Medical Treatment Visa (Type – D/TR)]
Please Note:
Visa Fee to be paid in Cash/POS/UPI at VFS counter. 
Visa Fee is Non-Refundable. 
Visa Fee is Gratis for Minors (upto 18 yrs of age)

[Table:  Tourist Visa (Type – C/T)]
Please note:
VFS Logistic charges to be paid in Cash/POS/UPI at the time of submission.
There is no exemption for VFS Service charge.
The above fee is non-refundable and non-transferable.

## Documents Required
- Application Form
- Travel document (passport) issued in the past 10 years, valid for at least 3 months beyond the intended date of leaving the territory of the Republic of Moldova (in the case of minors - additionally the birth certificate and the passport of the legal representative);
- Two (02) recent passport size photographs. A récent mat, colour photo 35mm x 45mm;
- The invitation issued by the General Inspectorate for Migration, if required (https://mfa.gov.md/en/content/visa-regime-foreigners), or the residence permit or valid visa (except a transit visa) issued by a member state of the European Union or by a state part to the Schengen Agreement, by the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, by the United States of America or by Canada; (must be valid at the time of submission at Embassy of Moldova)
- Proof of means of support and medical treatment;
- Proof of having the capacity to accompany a foreigner who is unable to care for himself/herself, if requested visa by the companion of the person under treatment;
- Criminal record from the country of origin, translated into Romanian or English and legalized or apostilled, except minors under 16 years, as the case may be;
- Travel medical insurance valid throughout the territory of the Republic of Moldova, which fully covers the expected period of stay and all expenses that repatriation for medical reasons, emergency medical treatments and/or emergency hospitalization or death may require, but not less than 30,000 euros
Note: Color Photocopies of all the original Indian documents and documents received from Moldova (Passport, previous visas, PCC, Invitation, Contract etc..) needs to be submitted along with the application.

## Photo Specifications
- The photograph must be in color.
- It should be without border.
- It should have a white background only.
- It should have a close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-80% of the photograph.
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly at the camera.
- It should be 3.5 cm X 4.5 cm.
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 1 month old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- Photograph can be taken with headgear, after consideration on case to case basis if the applicant wears headgear on religious grounds. The main characteristics of the face must be apparent from the photograph. Chin, nose, eyes, ears and eyebrows must not be covered; the forehead should be uncovered to the extent that the shape of the face is apparent. Teeth should not be visible.
- It should be without hat/cap.
- The photograph should not have any staple marks.
- Scanned & color photocopies would NOT be accepted.

## Processing Time
Processing time for Moldova Visa would be as per below:
- India - minimum 10 working days
Please Note: -
- Please note that this is an indicative processing time only. Processing time may increase or decrease at the discretion of the Embassy of Moldova, New Delhi.

visa_types.name: Employment Visa (Type – D/AM)
visa_types.documents_required:
- Application Form
- Travel document (passport) issued in the past 10 years, valid for at least 3 months beyond the intended date of leaving the territory of the Republic of Moldova (in the case of minors - additionally the birth certificate and the passport of the legal representative);
- Two (02) recent passport size photographs. A récent mat, colour photo 35mm x 45mm;
- The invitation issued by the General Inspectorate for Migration, if required (https://mfa.gov.md/en/content/visa-regime-foreigners), or the residence permit or valid visa (except a transit visa) issued by a member state of the European Union or by a state part to the Schengen Agreement, by the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, by the United States of America or by Canada; (must be valid at the time of submission at Embassy of Moldova)
- The decision regarding the granting of the right of temporary residence for work purposes:
- Criminal record from the country of origin, translated into Romanian or English and legalized or apostilled, as applicable;
- Proof of Means of Subsistence
This requirement may be fulfilled by providing one of the following:
- A personal bank statement, bank letter, or bank certificate of the applicant, confirming the availability of sufficient financial means amounting to at least EUR 30 per day of stay. The bank document must be issued no earlier than 10 days prior to the date of submission at the Embassy of the Republic of Moldova.
- A Commitment of Maintenance and Accommodation (Accommodation Letter) duly completed and signed by a company registered in the Republic of Moldova (downloadable form (https://mfa.gov.md/sites/default/files/anexa3_hg_nr_50_din_15_01_2013_ro_16.pdf)), accompanied by the company’s bank statement, bank letter, or bank certificate. The bank document must be issued no earlier than 10 days prior to the date of submission at the Embassy of the Republic of Moldova and must confirm the availability of sufficient funds of at least EUR 30 per day of stay.
If a group of applicants submits the same company’s bank statement, the document must confirm the availability of sufficient funds to cover at least EUR 30 per day of stay for each applicant included in the group.
Furthermore, please be advised that a Commitment of Maintenance and Accommodation signed by a company is not considered valid unless it is accompanied by the corresponding bank statement of the company.
- Travel medical insurance valid throughout the territory of the Republic of Moldova, which fully covers the expected period of stay and all expenses that repatriation for medical reasons, emergency medical treatments and/or emergency hospitalization or death may require, but not less than 30,000 euros
Note: Color Photocopies of all the original Indian documents and documents received from Moldova (Passport, previous visas, PCC, Invitation, Contract etc..) needs to be submitted along with the application.
Other documents, such as the employment contract, etc., are not mandatory but may be submitted as supplementary documents.

- Travel medical insurance valid throughout the territory of the Republic of Moldova, which fully covers the expected period of stay and all expenses that repatriation for medical reasons, emergency medical treatments and/or emergency hospitalization or death may require, but not less than 30,000 euros
Note: Color Photocopies of all the original Indian documents and documents received from Moldova (Passport, previous visas, PCC, Invitation, Contract etc..) needs to be submitted along with the application.

## Photo Specifications
- The photograph must be in color.
- It should be without border.
- It should have a white background only.
- It should have a close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-80% of the photograph.
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly at the camera.
- It should be 3.5 cm X 4.5 cm.
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 1 month old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- Photograph can be taken with headgear, after consideration on case to case basis if the applicant wears headgear on religious grounds. The main characteristics of the face must be apparent from the photograph. Chin, nose, eyes, ears and eyebrows must not be covered; the forehead should be uncovered to the extent that the shape of the face is apparent. Teeth should not be visible.
- It should be without hat/cap.
- The photograph should not have any staple marks.
- Scanned & color photocopies would NOT be accepted.

- Processing time for Moldova Visa would be as per below:
- India - minimum 10 working days
